items.html: Yet you must know that the sparks that are clarified and rise in the discernment of MAN [Mayin Nukvin] by the sons who raise them — since of themselves they can rise only from the second time onward, as said above — those MAN are not completed immediately then, nor do they come at once to correction. Rather, at first, at the first time, the MAN rose to AVI [Aba ve Ima] not by means of ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva], and from those MAN the discernment of ZON was made. And after ZON was corrected, then, at the second time, they raised other MAN and other sparks up to the upper Ima; and then those sparks joined together and were there in the belly of the upper Ima, but the form of the newborn could not be corrected and depicted from them, for they had then just come out from within the Klipot [shells]. Rather, they returned with ZON, and all of them together rose again to raise other MAN a second time; and then, since they had already tarried there that length of time, they can be corrected — and then they are depicted and come out. And those MAN return and raise, with the joining of ZON, other MAN, and then those are depicted and corrected. And so it proceeds in this way always.
